summary: Fantastic soundboard capture of a beloved show with Phil’s booming bass and Bob “on fire,” plus a coveted China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider moment.
review: All three reviewers rave about this recording, calling the soundboard “fantastic” and praising the prominence of Phil Lesh’s playing. Bob Weir receives a special shout‑out for being “on fire,” and one fan wishes for an especially great China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider sequence in the second set. No technical flaws are reported, making it both a musical and sonic treat.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star reviews highlight excellent soundboard quality and strong performances; no negative comments were found.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Fantastically clear mix with prominent Phil Lesh bass; reviewers report no issues.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers focus on overall performance rather than set structure, but the desire for a top‑notch China Cat > Rider indicates that the second set is especially anticipated.

band_member_comments.Phil: Treat to hear all that Phil – his bass is highlighted and praised.
band_member_comments.Bob: "bobby is on fire" – strong praise for Bob Weir’s guitar/vocals.
